success_criteria: Codex instruction consumer validates and records this instruction without bypassing safety gates.

parameters.summary: Phase 0 stabilization: TV Section 6 publication remains HELD_MONITOR_ACTIVE_PUBLICATION_COOLDOWN with 28/28 pilot episodes privately validated but no Plex-visible mutation. Materialized QA is REVIEW; no expansion, publishing, source movement, or long QA permitted. Primary architecture remains materialized_webdav_symlink. Legacy resolver paused.
